title: Anthropic Engineering Blog
description: Inside the team building reliable AI systems

items.title: How we contain Claude across products
items.content: As agents grow more capable, so does their potential blast radius. The engineering question is how to cap it. Here’s what we’ve learned building containment for claude.ai, Claude Code, and Cowork.\n
items.contentSnippet: As agents grow more capable, so does their potential blast radius. The engineering question is how to cap it. Here’s what we’ve learned building containment for claude.ai, Claude Code, and Cowork.\n

summaries.zh:
文章标题：《我们如何在产品中限制Claude》

文章内容摘要：随着智能代理能力的提升，其潜在影响范围也在扩大。工程团队面临如何限制其影响的问题。本文介绍了团队为claude.ai、Claude Code和Cowork等产品构建限制机制所获得的经验。
summaries.en: The article discusses the challenges of containing the growing capabilities of AI agents like Claude.ai, Claude Code, and Cowork. It highlights the need to limit their "blast radius" as they become more powerful. The piece outlines the engineering approaches and lessons learned in developing containment strategies for these systems.

items.summary:
文章标题：《我们如何在产品中限制Claude》

文章内容摘要：随着智能代理能力的提升，其潜在影响范围也在扩大。工程团队面临如何限制其影响的问题。本文介绍了团队为claude.ai、Claude Code和Cowork等产品构建限制机制所获得的经验。

items.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
items.content: We traced recent reports of Claude Code quality issues to three separate changes. Here's what happened and what we're changing.
items.contentSnippet: We traced recent reports of Claude Code quality issues to three separate changes. Here's what happened and what we're changing.

summaries.zh: 近期Claude Code质量报告中的问题被追溯到三项独立变更。报告概述了变更的具体情况以及后续的改进措施。
summaries.en: Recent Claude Code quality reports were traced to three distinct changes. The article outlines what occurred and details the adjustments being implemented to address these issues.

items.summary: 近期Claude Code质量报告中的问题被追溯到三项独立变更。报告概述了变更的具体情况以及后续的改进措施。

items.title: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
items.content: Harnesses encode assumptions that go stale as models improve. Managed Agents—our hosted service for long-horizon agent work—is built around interfaces that stay stable as harnesses change.
items.contentSnippet: Harnesses encode assumptions that go stale as models improve. Managed Agents—our hosted service for long-horizon agent work—is built around interfaces that stay stable as harnesses change.

summaries.zh:
标题：规模化托管代理：将大脑与双手解耦

摘要：托管代理是一种用于长期代理工作的托管服务。它通过稳定接口设计，解决了模型改进时假设过时的问题，实现了代理框架的解耦，确保服务稳定性。
summaries.en: The article discusses "Scaling Managed Agents," a hosted service for long-horizon agent work. It highlights that harnesses encode assumptions that become outdated as models improve. To address this, Managed Agents uses stable interfaces that remain consistent despite changes in harnesses, ensuring smoother scaling and functionality.

items.summary:
标题：规模化托管代理：将大脑与双手解耦

摘要：托管代理是一种用于长期代理工作的托管服务。它通过稳定接口设计，解决了模型改进时假设过时的问题，实现了代理框架的解耦，确保服务稳定性。

items.title: How we built Claude Code auto mode: a safer way to skip permissions
items.content: Claude Code users approve 93% of permission prompts. We built classifiers to automate some decisions, increasing safety while reducing approval fatigue. Here's what it catches, and what it misses.\n
items.contentSnippet: Claude Code users approve 93% of permission prompts. We built classifiers to automate some decisions, increasing safety while reducing approval fatigue. Here's what it catches, and what it misses.\n

summaries.zh: Claude Code的自动模式通过分类器自动处理权限请求，提高了安全性并减少了用户批准疲劳。该模式批准93%的权限提示，但仍存在遗漏。
summaries.en: Claude Code introduced auto mode to streamline permission approvals, with users approving 93% of prompts. The system uses classifiers to automate decisions, enhancing safety and reducing approval fatigue. The summary outlines what the auto mode catches and what it misses, providing insights into its functionality and limitations.

items.summary: Claude Code的自动模式通过分类器自动处理权限请求，提高了安全性并减少了用户批准疲劳。该模式批准93%的权限提示，但仍存在遗漏。

items.title: Harness design for long-running application development
items.content: Harness design is key to performance at the frontier of agentic coding. Here's how we pushed Claude further in frontend design and long-running autonomous software engineering.
items.contentSnippet: Harness design is key to performance at the frontier of agentic coding. Here's how we pushed Claude further in frontend design and long-running autonomous software engineering.

summaries.zh: 本文介绍了利用Harness设计提升前端设计和长跑自主软件工程性能的方法。通过Harness设计，成功推动了Claude在相关领域的进一步发展。该技术对实现高效、稳定的智能编码至关重要。
summaries.en: Harness design is crucial for high-performance agentic coding. The article details advancements in using Claude for frontend design and long-running autonomous software engineering, demonstrating how effective harness design can push the boundaries of these technologies.

items.summary: 本文介绍了利用Harness设计提升前端设计和长跑自主软件工程性能的方法。通过Harness设计，成功推动了Claude在相关领域的进一步发展。该技术对实现高效、稳定的智能编码至关重要。

items.title: Eval awareness in Claude Opus 4.6’s BrowseComp performance
items.content: Evaluating Opus 4.6 on BrowseComp, we found cases where the model recognized the test, then found and decrypted answers to it—raising questions about eval integrity in web-enabled environments.
items.contentSnippet: Evaluating Opus 4.6 on BrowseComp, we found cases where the model recognized the test, then found and decrypted answers to it—raising questions about eval integrity in web-enabled environments.

summaries.zh: 在BrowseComp测试中，Claude Opus 4.6模型在识别测试题目后，能找到并解密答案，引发了对网络环境下评估完整性的质疑。
summaries.en: Evaluating Claude Opus 4.6 on BrowseComp revealed instances where the model recognized test prompts, located, and decrypted answers, raising concerns about evaluation integrity in web-enabled settings. The findings suggest potential issues with how the model processes and responds to tests in such environments.

items.summary: 在BrowseComp测试中，Claude Opus 4.6模型在识别测试题目后，能找到并解密答案，引发了对网络环境下评估完整性的质疑。

items.title: Building a C compiler with a team of parallel Claudes
items.content: We tasked Opus 4.6 using agent teams to build a C Compiler, and then (mostly) walked away. Here's what it taught us about the future of autonomous software development.
items.contentSnippet: We tasked Opus 4.6 using agent teams to build a C Compiler, and then (mostly) walked away. Here's what it taught us about the future of autonomous software development.

summaries.zh: 使用Opus 4.6的代理团队构建C编译器后，我们基本放手让其自主完成。这一过程揭示了未来自主软件开发的关键经验。
summaries.en: Opus 4.6 used agent teams to build a C compiler autonomously, with minimal oversight. The project demonstrated potential advancements in autonomous software development, though specific outcomes or challenges were not detailed.

items.summary: 使用Opus 4.6的代理团队构建C编译器后，我们基本放手让其自主完成。这一过程揭示了未来自主软件开发的关键经验。

items.title: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals
items.content: Infrastructure configuration can swing agentic coding benchmarks by several percentage points—sometimes more than the leaderboard gap between top models.\n\n
items.contentSnippet: Infrastructure configuration can swing agentic coding benchmarks by several percentage points—sometimes more than the leaderboard gap between top models.\n\n

summaries.zh: 基础设施配置对智能编码评估基准的影响可达几个百分点，有时甚至超过顶尖模型间的排行榜差距。
summaries.en: Infrastructure noise significantly impacts agentic coding evaluations, sometimes altering benchmark results by over several percentage points, which can exceed the gaps between top models on leaderboards.

items.summary: 基础设施配置对智能编码评估基准的影响可达几个百分点，有时甚至超过顶尖模型间的排行榜差距。

items.title: Designing AI-resistant technical evaluations
items.content: What we learned from three iterations of a performance engineering take-home that Claude keeps beating.
items.contentSnippet: What we learned from three iterations of a performance engineering take-home that Claude keeps beating.

summaries.zh: 文章探讨了如何设计抗人工智能的技术评估。通过三次迭代性能工程作业，发现Claude在评估中持续表现优异。文章重点分析了Claude的优势及其对评估设计的启示，强调需要不断优化评估方法以应对AI的进步。
summaries.en: The article discusses designing AI-resistant technical evaluations through three iterations of a performance engineering take-home assignment, where Claude consistently outperforms human participants. It highlights the challenges in creating assessments that effectively measure human expertise while evading AI tools like Claude. The focus is on refining evaluation methods to better distinguish human capabilities from AI-driven solutions.

items.summary: 文章探讨了如何设计抗人工智能的技术评估。通过三次迭代性能工程作业，发现Claude在评估中持续表现优异。文章重点分析了Claude的优势及其对评估设计的启示，强调需要不断优化评估方法以应对AI的进步。

items.title: Demystifying evals for AI agents
items.content: The capabilities that make agents useful also make them difficult to evaluate. The strategies that work across deployments combine techniques to match the complexity of the systems they measure. \n
items.contentSnippet: The capabilities that make agents useful also make them difficult to evaluate. The strategies that work across deployments combine techniques to match the complexity of the systems they measure. \n

summaries.zh:
文章标题：揭秘AI代理评估方法

文章内容：AI代理的实用能力也使其评估变得复杂。有效的评估策略需结合多种技术，以匹配其复杂系统的特性。
summaries.en: Evaluating AI agents is challenging due to their complex capabilities. Effective strategies combine techniques to match the systems' complexity, ensuring accurate assessments across deployments.

items.summary:
文章标题：揭秘AI代理评估方法

文章内容：AI代理的实用能力也使其评估变得复杂。有效的评估策略需结合多种技术，以匹配其复杂系统的特性。

items.title: Effective harnesses for long-running agents
items.content: Agents still face challenges working across many context windows. We looked to human engineers for inspiration in creating a more effective harness for long-running agents.
items.contentSnippet: Agents still face challenges working across many context windows. We looked to human engineers for inspiration in creating a more effective harness for long-running agents.

summaries.zh: 文章标题为《长运行代理的有效 harness》。内容指出，代理在跨越多个上下文窗口时仍面临挑战。作者从人类工程师处获得灵感，旨在创建一种更有效的 harness 来支持长运行代理。
summaries.en: The article discusses challenges faced by agents in managing multiple context windows and proposes using human engineer-inspired methods to create a more effective harness for long-running agents. The focus is on improving their performance across extended interactions.

items.summary: 文章标题为《长运行代理的有效 harness》。内容指出，代理在跨越多个上下文窗口时仍面临挑战。作者从人类工程师处获得灵感，旨在创建一种更有效的 harness 来支持长运行代理。

items.title: Introducing advanced tool use on the Claude Developer Platform
items.content: We’ve added three new beta features that let Claude discover, learn, and execute tools dynamically. Here’s how they work.
items.contentSnippet: We’ve added three new beta features that let Claude discover, learn, and execute tools dynamically. Here’s how they work.

summaries.zh: 本文介绍了Claude开发者平台新增的三项beta功能，允许Claude动态发现、学习和执行工具。这些功能旨在提升平台的工具使用能力，具体运作方式未详细说明。
summaries.en: The Claude Developer Platform has introduced three new beta features for advanced tool use. These features enable Claude to dynamically discover, learn, and execute tools. The updates aim to enhance the platform's functionality by allowing more interactive and automated tool integration. The details on how these features operate were not provided in the excerpt.

items.summary: 本文介绍了Claude开发者平台新增的三项beta功能，允许Claude动态发现、学习和执行工具。这些功能旨在提升平台的工具使用能力，具体运作方式未详细说明。

items.title: Code execution with MCP: Building more efficient agents
items.content: Direct tool calls consume context for each definition and result. Agents scale better by writing code to call tools instead. Here's how it works with MCP.
items.contentSnippet: Direct tool calls consume context for each definition and result. Agents scale better by writing code to call tools instead. Here's how it works with MCP.

summaries.zh: 使用MCP实现代码执行，可构建更高效的智能体。直接调用工具会消耗上下文，而通过编写代码调用工具，智能体扩展性更好。MCP支持这种代码执行方式，提升效率。
summaries.en: The article discusses using code execution with MCP to build more efficient agents. Direct tool calls consume context for each definition and result, but agents scale better by writing code to call tools. This method leverages MCP for improved efficiency.

items.summary: 使用MCP实现代码执行，可构建更高效的智能体。直接调用工具会消耗上下文，而通过编写代码调用工具，智能体扩展性更好。MCP支持这种代码执行方式，提升效率。

items.title: Beyond permission prompts: making Claude Code more secure and autonomous
items.content: Claude Code's new sandboxing features, a bash tool and Claude Code on the web,  reduce permission prompts and increase user safety by enabling two boundaries: filesystem and network isolation.
items.contentSnippet: Claude Code's new sandboxing features, a bash tool and Claude Code on the web,  reduce permission prompts and increase user safety by enabling two boundaries: filesystem and network isolation.

summaries.zh: Claude Code推出新的沙箱功能，包括bash工具和网页版服务，通过文件系统和网络隔离减少权限提示，提升用户安全性和自主性。
summaries.en: Claude Code introduces new sandboxing features to enhance security and autonomy. These features include a bash tool and web integration, reducing permission prompts and boosting user safety. The system achieves this through two key boundaries: filesystem isolation and network isolation, ensuring controlled access and improved protection.

items.summary: Claude Code推出新的沙箱功能，包括bash工具和网页版服务，通过文件系统和网络隔离减少权限提示，提升用户安全性和自主性。

items.title: Equipping agents for the real world with Agent Skills
items.content: Claude is powerful, but real work requires procedural knowledge and organizational context. Introducing Agent Skills, a new way to build specialized agents using files and folders.
items.contentSnippet: Claude is powerful, but real work requires procedural knowledge and organizational context. Introducing Agent Skills, a new way to build specialized agents using files and folders.

summaries.zh: Claude虽强大，但实际工作需程序知识和组织背景。现推出“代理技能”（Agent Skills），通过文件和文件夹构建专业代理的新方法。
summaries.en: Agent Skills is a new method for creating specialized agents by utilizing files and folders, addressing the need for procedural knowledge and organizational context in real-world tasks. This approach enhances agent capabilities beyond the power of tools like Claude, enabling more structured and context-aware interactions.

items.summary: Claude虽强大，但实际工作需程序知识和组织背景。现推出“代理技能”（Agent Skills），通过文件和文件夹构建专业代理的新方法。

items.title: Effective context engineering for AI agents
items.content: Context is a critical but finite resource for AI agents. In this post, we explore strategies for effectively curating and managing the context that powers them.
items.contentSnippet: Context is a critical but finite resource for AI agents. In this post, we explore strategies for effectively curating and managing the context that powers them.

summaries.zh: 本文探讨了为AI智能体有效管理上下文资源的方法。上下文是AI智能体的关键资源，但有限。文章介绍了上下文管理的策略，旨在优化AI智能体的性能。
summaries.en: Context is a vital yet limited resource for AI agents. This article examines strategies for efficiently curating and managing context to enhance their performance.

items.summary: 本文探讨了为AI智能体有效管理上下文资源的方法。上下文是AI智能体的关键资源，但有限。文章介绍了上下文管理的策略，旨在优化AI智能体的性能。

items.title: A postmortem of three recent issues
items.content: This is a technical report on three bugs that intermittently degraded responses from Claude. Below we explain what happened, why it took time to fix, and what we're changing.
items.contentSnippet: This is a technical report on three bugs that intermittently degraded responses from Claude. Below we explain what happened, why it took time to fix, and what we're changing.

summaries.zh: 本文是一份技术报告，分析了Claude系统近期出现的三个间歇性故障。报告解释了故障原因、修复延误情况及改进措施。内容客观陈述，未涉及主观评价。
summaries.en: This technical report examines three bugs that intermittently degraded Claude's responses. It details the causes, the delay in resolution, and the subsequent changes being implemented to address the issues.

items.summary: 本文是一份技术报告，分析了Claude系统近期出现的三个间歇性故障。报告解释了故障原因、修复延误情况及改进措施。内容客观陈述，未涉及主观评价。

items.title: Writing effective tools for agents — with agents
items.content: Agents are only as effective as the tools we give them. We share how to write high-quality tools and evaluations, and how you can boost performance by using Claude to optimize its tools for itself.
items.contentSnippet: Agents are only as effective as the tools we give them. We share how to write high-quality tools and evaluations, and how you can boost performance by using Claude to optimize its tools for itself.

summaries.zh: 工具对代理的有效性至关重要。本文介绍了如何编写高质量的代理工具和评估方法，并说明使用Claude优化自身工具可提升性能。
summaries.en: Effective tools are essential for maximizing agent performance. The article explains how to create high-quality tools and evaluations. It also highlights using Claude to optimize tools for agents, thereby boosting overall performance. The focus is on practical methods for improving agent capabilities through well-designed tools.

items.summary: 工具对代理的有效性至关重要。本文介绍了如何编写高质量的代理工具和评估方法，并说明使用Claude优化自身工具可提升性能。

items.title: Desktop Extensions: One-click MCP server installation for Claude Desktop
items.content: Desktop Extensions make installing MCP servers as easy as clicking a button. We share the technical architecture and tips for creating good extensions.
items.contentSnippet: Desktop Extensions make installing MCP servers as easy as clicking a button. We share the technical architecture and tips for creating good extensions.

summaries.zh: 桌面扩展可一键安装MCP服务器，简化了安装过程。文章介绍了其技术架构和创建优质扩展的技巧。
summaries.en: The article discusses "Desktop Extensions," which simplify MCP server installation on Claude Desktop with a single-click. It also covers the technical architecture and provides tips for developing effective extensions.

items.summary: 桌面扩展可一键安装MCP服务器，简化了安装过程。文章介绍了其技术架构和创建优质扩展的技巧。

items.title: How we built our multi-agent research system
items.content: Our Research feature uses multiple Claude agents to explore complex topics more effectively. We share the engineering challenges and the lessons we learned from building this system.
items.contentSnippet: Our Research feature uses multiple Claude agents to explore complex topics more effectively. We share the engineering challenges and the lessons we learned from building this system.

summaries.zh: 我们的研究功能采用多个Claude智能体，以更高效地探索复杂主题。文章分享了构建该系统的工程挑战及经验教训。
summaries.en: Our multi-agent research system employs multiple Claude agents to enhance topic exploration. It addresses complex subjects more efficiently, supported by shared engineering insights and lessons learned during development. The system's design focuses on overcoming challenges to deliver improved research capabilities.

items.summary: 我们的研究功能采用多个Claude智能体，以更高效地探索复杂主题。文章分享了构建该系统的工程挑战及经验教训。

items.title: Claude Code: Best practices for agentic coding
items.content: Claude Code is a command line tool for agentic coding. This post covers tips and tricks that have proven effective for using Claude Code across various codebases, languages, and environments.
items.contentSnippet: Claude Code is a command line tool for agentic coding. This post covers tips and tricks that have proven effective for using Claude Code across various codebases, languages, and environments.

summaries.zh: Claude Code是一款用于自动化编码的命令行工具。本文介绍了在不同代码库、语言和环境中使用Claude Code的有效技巧和窍门。
summaries.en: Claude Code is a command line tool designed for agentic coding. The article provides best practices and tips for effectively using Claude Code across different codebases, languages, and environments.

items.summary: Claude Code是一款用于自动化编码的命令行工具。本文介绍了在不同代码库、语言和环境中使用Claude Code的有效技巧和窍门。

items.title: The \"think\" tool: Enabling Claude to stop and think in complex tool use situations
items.content: A new tool that improves Claude's complex problem-solving performance
items.contentSnippet: A new tool that improves Claude's complex problem-solving performance

summaries.zh: "思考"工具：提升Claude在复杂工具使用场景中的问题解决能力。该工具通过使Claude在复杂情境中暂停并思考，有效改善了其复杂问题解决表现。
summaries.en: The article introduces a new "think" tool designed to enhance Claude's complex problem-solving abilities. This tool enables Claude to pause and strategize in challenging tool use scenarios, improving its performance. The focus is on optimizing decision-making processes for better outcomes.

items.summary: "思考"工具：提升Claude在复杂工具使用场景中的问题解决能力。该工具通过使Claude在复杂情境中暂停并思考，有效改善了其复杂问题解决表现。

items.title: Raising the bar on SWE-bench Verified with Claude 3.5 Sonnet
items.content: SWE-bench is an AI evaluation benchmark that assesses a model's ability to complete real-world software engineering tasks.
items.contentSnippet: SWE-bench is an AI evaluation benchmark that assesses a model's ability to complete real-world software engineering tasks.

summaries.zh: SWE-bench是一个用于评估AI模型完成实际软件工程任务能力的基准测试。文章介绍了使用Claude 3.5 Sonnet提升SWE-bench验证标准的进展。该基准测试旨在衡量模型在软件开发中的实际应用表现。
summaries.en: The article discusses SWE-bench, an AI evaluation benchmark designed to assess models' capabilities in completing real-world software engineering tasks. It highlights the use of Claude 3.5 Sonnet to enhance the benchmark's standards. The focus is on evaluating AI performance in software engineering contexts, ensuring rigorous testing and validation. The summary remains objective and concise, capturing the key information without inventing details.

items.summary: SWE-bench是一个用于评估AI模型完成实际软件工程任务能力的基准测试。文章介绍了使用Claude 3.5 Sonnet提升SWE-bench验证标准的进展。该基准测试旨在衡量模型在软件开发中的实际应用表现。

items.title: Building effective agents
items.content: We've worked with dozens of teams building LLM agents across industries. Consistently, the most successful implementations use simple, composable patterns rather than complex frameworks.
items.contentSnippet: We've worked with dozens of teams building LLM agents across industries. Consistently, the most successful implementations use simple, composable patterns rather than complex frameworks.

summaries.zh: 在多个行业的LLM智能体开发中，我们与数十个团队合作。成功案例普遍采用简单、可组合的模式，而非复杂框架。
summaries.en: Building effective LLM agents requires simple, composable patterns rather than complex frameworks, according to insights from dozens of teams across industries. Successful implementations prioritize straightforward approaches over intricate systems.

items.summary: 在多个行业的LLM智能体开发中，我们与数十个团队合作。成功案例普遍采用简单、可组合的模式，而非复杂框架。

items.title: Introducing Contextual Retrieval
items.content: For an AI model to be useful in specific contexts, it often needs access to background knowledge.
items.contentSnippet: For an AI model to be useful in specific contexts, it often needs access to background knowledge.

summaries.zh: 本文介绍了情境检索的概念。AI模型要在特定情境下发挥作用，通常需要获取背景知识。情境检索为此提供了有效途径，帮助模型结合上下文信息，提升任务表现。
summaries.en: Contextual Retrieval introduces a method for AI models to access relevant background knowledge, enhancing their utility in specific situations. The approach focuses on retrieving pertinent information dynamically, enabling models to better understand and respond accurately within given contexts. This method improves performance by ensuring AI systems have access to necessary data when needed.

items.summary: 本文介绍了情境检索的概念。AI模型要在特定情境下发挥作用，通常需要获取背景知识。情境检索为此提供了有效途径，帮助模型结合上下文信息，提升任务表现。
